2.description: You gain two eldritch invocations of your choice. When you gain certain warlock levels, you gain additional invocations of your choice. A level prerequisite refers to your level in this class. Additionally, when you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the invocations you know and replace it with another invocation that you could learn at that level.

4.description: Whenever you reach a level in this class that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature, you can do one of the following, representing a change of focus in your occult studies: (Replace one cantrip you learned from this class's Pact Magic feature with another cantrip from the warlock spell list), (Replace the option you chose for the Pact Boon feature with one of that feature's other options), (If you're 12th level or higher, replace one spell from your Mystic Arcanum feature with another warlock spell of the same level). If this change makes you ineligible for any of your Eldritch Invocations, you must also replace them now, choosing invocations for which you qualify.

5.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

7.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

If this change makes you ineligible for any of your Eldritch Invocations, you must also replace them now, choosing invocations for which you qualify.

9.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

11.description: You gain a 6th-level spell from the warlock spell list as a mystic arcanum, you may cast this spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

12.description: You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

15.description: You gain a 8th-level spell from the warlock spell list as a mystic arcanum, you may cast this spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot.
You learn an additional Eldritch Invocation of your choice.

17.description: You gain a 9th-level spell from the warlock spell list as a mystic arcanum, you may cast this spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

19.description: Whenever you reach a level in this class that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature, you can do one of the following, representing a change of focus in your occult studies: (Replace one cantrip you learned from this class's Pact Magic feature with another cantrip from the warlock spell list), (Replace the option you chose for the Pact Boon feature with one of that feature's other options), (If you're 12th level or higher, replace one spell from your Mystic Arcanum feature with another warlock spell of the same level). If this change makes you ineligible for any of your Eldritch Invocations, you must also replace them now, choosing invocations for which you qualify.

20.description: You can spend 1 minute entreating your patron for aid to regain all your expended spell slots from your Pact Magic feature. Once you regain spell slots with this feature, you must finish a long rest before you can do so again.
